opinion.h: FRENCH v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES. No. 581. Decided December 12, 1966.
opinion.p: Roger Arnebergh, Philip E. Grey and Edward L. Davenport for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h: MASON v. CITY OF BILOXI, 385 U.S. 370 (1966)
opinion.p: 385 U.S. 370 MASON ET AL. v. CITY OF BILOXI. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSISSIPPI. No. 328. Decided December 12, 1966.
Jack Greenberg, James M. Nabrit III and R. Jess Brown for petitioners.
Albert Sidney Johnston, Jr., for respondent.
The petition for a writ of certiorari is granted and the judgment of the Supreme Court of Mississippi is reversed. Burton v. Wilmington Parking Authority, 365 U.S. 715.
MR. JUSTICE HARLAN is of the opinion that certiorari should be granted and the case set for oral argument.
